strategy: Only 1,800 health, so plan to kill your target in one clean hit rather than chipping.
After you attack, he shields the ally you hit against that exact school, so follow-up hits into the same target land into a matching shield.
Attack with Life (he takes +15%); he only resists his own Death 35%.
Avoid multi-hit spells (Hydra, etc.) and unnecessary AoEs — each hit lets him stack another shield.
Blade up and drop one single decisive hit to finish before his shields matter.
cheatNotes: After you attack, he shields the ally you hit against that school. Plan to kill your target in one hit, since follow-ups run into a matching shield.
An AoE makes him shield every ally three times over — one-shot the group with a blade-stacked AoE or pick targets off individually.
Hitting with Balance just gets a Tower Shield up on the target instead.
Multi-hit spells let him stack a shield per hit — use one clean single hit here.
